known_conditions: Only the original human-reviewed pilot themes can have live snapshots until providers publish governed history for the expanded taxonomy.
Unavailable launch themes are directory-ready but are excluded from rankings, Reports, and strong Copilot conclusions.
Historical analytics use current membership; historical membership reconstruction remains future work.

performance.hardware: Local Codex workspace host; results are not production SLOs.
performance.network_guard: AF_INET and AF_INET6 socket creation blocked for the entire measured region; local event-loop socket pairs remain enabled
